sections.paragraph:
verb בוית

be domesticated, tamed

verb להתבית (>>להתביית)

be domesticated

masculine noun בית (>>ביית)

byte (computers)

masculine noun

house, home, residence, residency, habitat, habitation, housing, nest, hearth, seat, shebang, dwelling, domicile, domicil; verse (poem)

feminine noun בת

daughter, girl

feminine noun

beth (second letter of Heb. alphabet)
